title: Drag and Drop Can Navigate to File and Chrome URIs Without Restriction
bounty_rationale: thank you reward -- while this report was the first report of this issue, a newer report of higher quality and demonstrating higher impact was also reported and helped to achieve the issue being prioritized and resolved
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**

Usually, navigation from an online site to a file URI or Chrome URI is blocked with "about:blank," but using Chrome drag and drop, the navigation is possible without restriction.

Below, the proof-of-concept demonstration shows four cases:
